# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2018-05-01/subscriptionDeploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "metadata": {
    "description": "Assigns Contributor role to an existing Service Principal at subscription level for CI/CD pipeline deployments."
  },
  "parameters": {
    "servicePrincipalObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The Object ID (not Application ID) of the Service Principal to assign the Contributor role to."
      }
    },
    "roleAssignmentGuid": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[newGuid()]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "A unique GUID for the role assignment. Defaults to a new GUID."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "contributorRoleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('roleAssignmentGuid')]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('contributorRoleDefinitionId')]",
        "principalId": "[parameters('servicePrincipalObjectId')]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal",
        "description": "Contributor role for CI/CD pipeline Service Principal - enables full infrastructure deployment automation"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "roleAssignmentId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', parameters('roleAssignmentGuid'))]"
    },
    "roleAssignmentName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('roleAssignmentGuid')]"
    },
    "assignedRoleDefinition": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "Contributor (b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c)"
    },
    "assignedPrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('servicePrincipalObjectId')]"
    }
  }
}
